name: Indigo Axis Bank Credit Card
exclusions: transactions excluded under IndiGo Axis Bank Credit Card terms
milestoneBenefits: Voucher worth 1,200 IndiGo BluChips on cumulative annual spends of Rs 1.5 lakh
Voucher worth 1,200 IndiGo BluChips again on cumulative annual spends of Rs 3 lakh
additionalBenefits: Voucher worth 1,200 IndiGo BluChips as welcome benefit on payment of joining fee
Voucher worth 1,200 IndiGo BluChips every year as renewal benefit on payment of annual fee
3 IndiGo BluChips per Rs 100 on all IndiGo channels
2 IndiGo BluChips per Rs 100 on grocery and dining
1 IndiGo BluChip per Rs 100 on other eligible categories
1 complimentary domestic airport lounge access per quarter, applicable on spends of Rs 50,000 in the preceding 3 months
EMI conversion available for transactions exceeding Rs 1,500
Wednesday Delight offers as per Axis Bank programme terms

salaried: Primary cardholder should be 18 to 70 years of age and resident of India
selfEmployed: Primary cardholder should be 18 to 70 years of age and resident of India
